results.title: UP Mango Festival wraps up: Farmers’ income, exports in focus; 147 awards given away
results.description: Minister of state (independent charge) for horticulture, agricultural marketing, agricultural foreign trade, and agricultural export, Dinesh Pratap Singh, who was the chief guest, distributed prizes to winners of various competitions and said the festival aimed to enhance farmers’ income while securing global recognition for Uttar Pradesh’s mangoes.

results.title: Kerr Kriisa Arrested: What Are the Federal Fraud Allegations Against the Ex-NCAA Basketball Star?
results.description: Former NCAA player Kerr Kriisa has been arrested in Kentucky amid a federal fraud investigation. Extradition to West Virginia is expected, with court details pending.

results.title: INS Sanshodhak joins Southern Naval Command in Kochi
results.description: INS Sanshodhak, the Indian Navy's fourth Survey Vessel Large, has arrived in Kochi, its new home port. Commissioned in Kolkata by Prime Minister Modi, this indigenously built ship boasts advanced hydrographic and oceanographic systems. Beyond its primary survey role, Sanshodhak can support disaster relief and function as a hospital ship, significantly boosting India's maritime capabilities and strategic reach.

results.title: Missouri mom of 5 fatally shot while buying slushies with children; police search for gunman
results.description: Missouri mom Shakeela Martin was fatally struck by nearby gunfire outside a gas station while getting slushies with two of her children.

results.title: 15 India-bound ships carrying urea, DAP and sulphur cross Hormuz: Govt
results.description: Despite Middle East conflict disruptions, India's fertilizer supply remains robust. Most shipments successfully navigated the Strait of Hormuz, while domestic production surpassed targets. Proactive planning, diplomatic outreach for new sources, and full restoration of natural gas to plants ensured uninterrupted availability, safeguarding farmers' interests against global price hikes. Ample stocks cover over 51% of annual demand.

results.title: Man donating kidney to teen neighbor
results.description: A Utah teen is getting a new kidney, thanks to a neighbor.
